description: Cross-client parity for fuzzy version-label selection (RFC 0001 Decision 3; xposed#13 / the f13 twin). When no exact version_code or label matches and fuzzy is opt-in enabled, both clients pick the closest registered label by COMPONENT-WISE lexicographic semver distance — NOT the old weighted-sum (major*10000 + minor*100 + patch), which overflowed its positional buckets and tied 1.0.142 with 1.1.42. Each `fuzzySelect` case lists registry `versions` (the available labels), a `target` label with no exact match, and the `expectSelected` label the closest-distance ranking must return. Both runners build a registry from those labels (each backed by a tiny throwaway map) and run their fuzzy selector (frida `pickMapForVersion` with versionMatch:'fuzzy'; xposed `VersionMatch.select` with allowFuzzyMatch=true). Provider-neutral; see README.md.

cases.name: distance tie breaks to the lower version (0.0.0 for target 1.0.0)
